arts.ttl: Man City's Grealish honours late brother with goal
arts.sum: Jack Grealish says he "was happy to start and score" after a 2-0 win against Leicester City, dedicating his goal to his late brother on the 25th anniversary of his death.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish dedicates his opener for Manchester City to his late brother
arts.sum: The England international hit his first Premier League goal for 16 months on the 25th anniversary of the death of his younger brother Keelan.

arts.ttl: Man City 2-0 Leicester: Jack Grealish ends Premier League goal drought as City maintain Champions League push
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola watched on from the stands as Man City eased to victory over the Premier League strugglers

arts.ttl: Grealish's nets emotional goal on 25th anniversary of brother's death
arts.sum: An emotional Jack Grealish revealed his goal against Leicester came on the 25th anniversary of his brother's death.

arts.ttl: No Haaland, no problem as Man City beat Leicester to go fourth
arts.sum: With Haaland likely to miss at least four more Premier League games with the ankle injury he suffered in Sunday's FA Cup quarter-final win at Bournemouth, several Man City attackers have a chance to stake a claim for a regular starting spot. Jack Grealish scored his first Premier League goal in almost 16 months as Manchester City moved up to fourth in the table with a 2-0 victory over Leicester City.

arts.ttl: 'Unfortunately' - Pep Guardiola gives Oscar Bobb update after Man City return
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Oscar Bobb's return to action after a lengthy lay-off

It’s not easy for the strikers and the people up front and in the middle because of how Leicester defended. Our No. 10 was involved throughout and perhaps should have been awarded a penalty after the break, but Guardiola says he was happy with his overall input.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish reveals the heartbreaking reason why his first Premier League goal in 16 months meant so much to him in emotional interview - after parents watched on from stands
arts.sum: Grealish netted inside two minutes at the Etihad to get Pep Guardiola's men off to the perfect start - almost 16 months after his last Premier League goal.

arts.ttl: Etihad crowd showed great warmth to Bobb, says Guardiola
arts.sum: Speaking in his post-match press conference, Guardiola highlighted that reception but also stressed that he will have to manage the Norwegian’s game time for the rest of this season. Pep Guardiola says the Etihad Stadium showed great warmth to Oscar Bobb on the Norwegian’s long-awaited return from injury.

arts.ttl: Man City needed third goal to relax - Guardiola
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says the 2-0 win over struggling Leicester "was not easy" and that Manchester City needed to score a "third goal was needed for the team to relax".
